news.summary: GUELPH, ON , April 16, 2025 - BIOREM Inc. (TSXV: BRM) reported a significant growth in its financial performance for the three and twelve-month periods concluding on December 31, 2024. The company witnessed a standout 49% surge in revenue, amounting to $37,419,000 for the full fiscal year 2024 compared to $25,165,000 in the previous year. Earnings also saw an impressive rise of 36%, with gross profit reaching $10,056,000 in 2024 in contrast to $7,022,000 in 2023. Operating expenses totaled $5,712,000, showcasing a hike from the prior year's $1,329,000. The detailed fiscal 2024 year-end financial statements and MD&A are now accessible on SEDAR (www.sedar.com). For comprehensive coverage of this news, interested readers can find the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Biorem records record revenues and earnings for 2024, with a 49% increase in revenue ($37,419k), 36% increase in earnings before tax, and a significant order backlog.

news.summary: The Ontario Chamber of Commerce (OCC) and Canadian Council for Indigenous Business (CCIB) have released a report series called A Way Forward, focusing on economic reconciliation, equity, and inclusive growth in Ontario. The first report emphasizes expanding Indigenous access to education and employment, creating inclusive workplaces, and strengthening Indigenous leadership. Subsequent reports will focus on finance, procurement, lands, resources, infrastructure, and communities. The aim is to support businesses in their reconciliation journeys and provide recommendations for creating opportunities for Indigenous talent to thrive. The initiative recognizes the need for action to address systemic barriers limiting Indigenous access to economic opportunities. Businesses are encouraged to utilize the reports as a roadmap to contribute to a future where Indigenous participation in the economy is more robust.
news.headline: Ontario Chamber of Commerce and Canadian Council for Indigenous Business launch "A Way Forward" report series on economic reconciliation, focusing on expanding Indigenous access to education and employment. Initiatives aim to strengthen Indigenous leadership and address systemic barriers for economic growth.ื

news.summary: In Miami, The Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT), a prominent Gen AI strategic consultancy and executive advisory firm, has introduced the Gen AI Executive Advisory Program. news.summary: Kia has recently introduced its inaugural all-electric worldwide sedan, incorporating the design theory 'Opposites United' which harmoniously fuses natural elements with human aspects to create a contemporary and distinctive look. The vehicle offers users a choice between two high voltage battery selections: a 58.3 kWh option named 'Light' and an 81.4 kWh long-range alternative called 'Wind' and 'GT-Line'. Notably, the EV4 Wind model boasts an impressive estimated range of around 330 miles on all-electric power.
news.headline: 2026 Kia EV4 debuts at NY Auto Show: all-electric sedan with 58.3 kWh and 81.4 kWh battery options, offering 330 miles range.

news.summary: Janover, a real estate-focused fintech firm, has acquired 80,567 Solana tokens for $10.5 million, reaching a total of 163,651.7 Solana tokens worth $21.2 million with staking rewards. Each share now owns 0.11 SOL valued at $14.47. Janover plans to stake the new SOL for additional revenue following a $42 million fundraising effort involving Pantera Capital, Kraken, and other investors. Former Kraken executives now control Janover, led by Joseph Onorati. The company joins others adding digital assets to their treasury, like MicroStrategy accumulating Bitcoin, with 528,185 BTC worth $44.2 billion, aiming for a hedge against inflation and portfolio diversification. Bitcoin's resilience against traditional markets is noted. Concerns remain over its status in a possible trade war, potentially pushing investors back to gold as a safer asset.
news.headline: Janover doubles Solana holdings, now worth $21.2M with 163,651.7 SOL. Acquired 80,567 SOL for $10.5M, plans to stake for revenue. CEO is former Kraken exec. Company raised $42M to enhance digital assets strategy. Janover joins companies adding altcoins to balance sheets. Strategy holds 528,185 BTC worth $44.2B. Bitcoin showing resilience amidst macroeconomic challenges. Some skeptical of trend holding. Magazine predicts Bitcoin at $100K by June.

news.summary: Based in San Francisco, Bauplan has launched a Python-first serverless data platform aimed at simplifying infrastructure processes into just a few lines of code for data lakes. The company announced its debut with a substantial $7.5 million in seed funding. Innovation Endeavors spearheaded the funding round, with support from industry experts Wes McKinney, Aditya Agarwal, and Chris Re. Notably, Ihab Ilyas has also come on board as an advisor. Bauplan enters an industry typically characterized by intricate platforms and specialized teams, aiming to streamline operations and broaden access.
news.headline: Bauplan launches with $7.5M seed funding to revolutionize data infrastructure in software engineering. Led by Innovation Endeavors. Advisor: Ihab Ilyas.

news.summary: Mayfield Village, Ohio - On April 16, 2025, Progressive Insurance introduced Cargo Plus, an enhanced endorsement to broaden the coverage of Motor Truck Cargo for for-hire truckers. This new offering aims to provide increased protection for valuable cargo. This expansion comes as part of the insurance provider's efforts to cater to the evolving needs of its customers and enhance their overall coverage. With the introduction of Cargo Plus, Progressive Insurance seeks to address the specific concerns of for-hire truckers by offering comprehensive coverage options.
news.headline: Progressive Insurance launches Cargo Plus coverage, expanding Motor Truck Cargo protection for for-hire truckers.

news.summary: In Houston, Raptor Technologies unveiled their latest innovation, Raptor® DismissalSafe™, aimed at streamlining and securing the end-of-day dismissal process in schools. This software program is a part of Raptor's School Safety Suite, emphasizing the importance of a safe student experience. With DismissalSafe, schools can expect smoother dismissal operations, providing peace of mind for both staff and parents. This release showcases Raptor's commitment to enhancing school safety, offering a comprehensive solution for student wellbeing.
news.headline: Raptor Technologies introduces DismissalSafe software for schools to enhance safety during dismissal, part of the School Safety Suite.

news.summary: A recent development in Princeton, NJ on April 16, 2025, revealed that BANC3 accomplished a notable feat by finalizing a Department of Defense project contract. They unveiled an innovative Computationally Efficient Wideband RF Sensing Algorithm for Threat Detection, marking significant progress in enhancing the threat detection capabilities of U.S. Army ground combat vehicles. This breakthrough technology showcases BANC3's proficiency in delivering cutting-edge solutions in the defense sector.
news.headline: BANC3 develops innovative Wideband RF Sensing Algorithm for Threat Detection, enhancing U.S. Army vehicles.

news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, One Source, a prominent technology advisory and managed IT services company, revealed the acquisition of CT Solutions. Known for their technology consulting and support services, CT Solutions will now operate under the name CT Solutions, a One Source company. This acquisition enhances One Source's capacity to streamline technology intricacies for businesses and offer customized solutions to meet changing customer demands.
news.headline: One Source buys CT Solutions to enhance tech services. CT Solutions now operates as a One Source company.

news.summary: An esteemed award has been granted to automotive suppliers for their exceptional innovation, technological progress, and business success. news.headline: OLEDWorks and Marelli win 2025 PACE Award for Digital OLED 2.0 panels in automotive industry, enhancing functionality.

news.summary: In New York, leading U.S. quantum security solutions provider, Qrypt, made an announcement appointing Nick Lippis to its Board of Advisors. Lippis, who co-founded ONUG (Open Network User Group), a community dedicated to enterprise infrastructure development, is well-known for his work in the field. This appointment reflects Qrypt's commitment to strengthening their advisory board with individuals bringing valuable insights and experience.
news.headline: Qrypt appoints Nick Lippis, co-founder of ONUG, to Board of Advisors, with expertise in disruptive tech and IT infrastructure.

news.summary: In New York, the software company Levels unveiled a collaboration with Season Health to provide its members with access to personalized dietitian coaching through the Levels app. This sought-after feature meets a key demand from Levels members for tailored nutrition guidance aligned with their individual needs, preferences, and health objectives. This partnership arrives as nearly half - around 50% - of consumers express confusion around health and nutrition decisions.
news.headline: Levels partners with Season Health to provide members insurance-covered dietitian support via the app, addressing top requests.

news.summary: In May, National Geographic will present a new series called "Tucci in Italy" featuring actor Stanley Tucci. The five-part show, produced by Tucci's SALT Productions and BBC Studios' Specialist Factual Productions, follows Tucci as he travels across Italy. The series showcases the country's stunning landscapes, intricate history, and diverse cuisine. Stanley Tucci, known for his award-winning performances, will offer audiences a personal and visually enticing journey through Italy.
news.headline: National Geographic releases trailer for TUCCI IN ITALY, showcasing Stanley Tucci’s 5-part journey across Italy.

news.summary: VeChain, a layer-1 blockchain platform, welcomes Dana White, CEO of the UFC, as its new advisor to boost mainstream awareness of blockchain tech. White's expertise in mass marketing adds value, alongside Nobel laureate Konstantin Novoselov. UFC's global reach of 950M households presents a vast audience for VeChain. White will contribute to VeChain's sustainability project, VeBetterDAO, without receiving compensation in tokens. The UFC already uses VeChain's NFC tech in fighter gloves to prevent fraud. Future collaborations with UFC and other partners are in the works. VeChain aims at supply chain enhancement and blockchain adoption.
news.headline: UFC CEO Dana White joins VeChain as advisor to expand blockchain reach, targeting UFC's 950M global viewers. White won't receive tokens as compensation.giene gloves to combat fraud in fundraising.

news.summary: A popular Korean brand, Samyang Foods, known for its famous Buldak Spicy Ramen, made a blazing entrance at the 2025 Coachella music festival in Los Angeles. news.headline: SAMYANG FOODS spices up Coachella with Buldak activation featuring Grammy-nominated GloRilla; Los Angeles, April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Every year, toxicology experts in MINNEAPOLIS, Minn. receive thousands of cannabis-related calls, highlighting the potential risks associated with marijuana exposure. A recent incident involved Gertie the goose, who was found to be affected by marijuana ingestion. Dr. Schmid emphasized that even if individuals do not personally use marijuana, it can still harm their pets. This underscores the importance of keeping cannabis products securely stored to prevent accidental ingestion by animals.
news.headline: Pet goose ingests marijuana joint; toxicology experts receive thousands of cannabis-related calls yearly. Dr. Schmid warns of pet impact.

news.summary: Today, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Featured.com, a platform linking experts with journalists, revealed its acquisition of Help A Reporter Out (HARO) from Cision. Cision, a prominent player in media intelligence and communication solutions, previously owned HARO. The transaction signals a significant move in the industry, consolidating forces to enhance opportunities for subject-matter experts and journalists.
news.headline: Featured.com has acquired Help A Reporter Out (HARO) from Cision, a media intelligence leader.

news.summary: A resident from Metter, Georgia, expressed frustration over the poor quality of pickets and invented PICKET FASTENERS to provide a solution. The invention offers a safer and more convenient method for fastening pickets to a handrail. This development comes in response to common issues like warping, rotting, and breaking, aiming to improve the installation or replacement process. The innovation is set to revolutionize the way pickets are secured, providing a more durable and efficient solution.
news.headline: Inventor creates PICKET FASTENERS for safer installation of pickets, resolves common issues; InventHelp assisted.
